introduction: SYNOPSISA young married couple lives happily selling fish at the wharf despite the poverty they live with day in and day out. But the wife ends up committing adultery. When her husband Jong-tae witnesses them, the situation drives him to be imprisoned. Upon serving seven years, Jong-tae is released and Young-min, his friend, tells him to go to a cabin in the mountains. A wealthy heiress, Sarah, visits him every weekend at the cabin and they share nights of passion. One day, Jong-tae finds Ju-ran who has collapsed in the garden. He hides her from Sarah and begins to fall for her. But they are soon found out and are forced to flee the cabin. Young-min asks Sarah for money and everything is revealed to have been a conspiracy故事虽然年轻夫妇幸福地生活不太顺利，但鱼被埋没在码头。但是，他开发了他的妻子曾与人通奸。旋风引起了网站的命运是真棒曼达jongtae丈夫送到监狱。在过去的7年中到期chulgam jongtae去山寨机在山中的任何yugok介绍朋友精明依偎深。比利亚已经大亨女继承人每个周末去划分jongtae和厚爱，jongtae发现了一个微弱的1天不可思议先生的花园，隐藏起来偷偷感受到爱，但事实曼达离开水桶或两个人的别墅。精明似乎已经失去了阴谋，一切他yeoteum要求他们的公司破产的份额...
